name: Akbhar Chowdhury
label: Software Developer
summary: A self-taught passionate programmer who acquired technical, analytical and reasoning skills through university and participating in hackathon and personal coding projects as a hobby. Enjoys keeping fit, organised, calculated and easy going.

work_experience.summary: Primarily been organising and sorting school uniform
highlights: Stocking items, filing paperwork, posting and packaging, organising school uniforms
Helping customers, for example by making suggestions

projects.title: Taste Temptations
projects.summary: Random recipe finder website with details page
highlights: search recipes by title and filter by  meal, cuisines and intolerances
details page listing summary (ingredients, instructions and similar recipes.)

projects.title: Personal blog website - BrightHabit
projects.summary: Developed CMS for users and authors to publish, modify and remove post
highlights: Advanced search feature - can search by post title, description or filter by tags (multiple)
Pagination
Role based authentication - the website authenticates if the user is signed in and if the post belongs to them for delete or modification.

projects.title: Recipe Finder app
projects.summary: An Android app that enables users to find and search for random recipe. The app connects to Spoonacular API - a nutrition, recipe and food API
highlights: Search feature - user can search for recipe and filter by meal type such as main dish and drinks
Recipe detail page - users can view more details about the recipe
Similar recipe suggestions and UI developed using material theme

images.caption: Recipe details with cooking instructions and equipment

projects.title: Data Visualisation
projects.summary: Developed interactive data visualisation based on personal interest.
highlights: Interactive bar chart
Pie chart showcasing how I spend my free time

projects.title: Random recipe finder
projects.summary: A recipe website enabling users to search and view recipes.
highlights: Displays random recipe on the homepage
Recipe details page with cooking instructions and ingredients

degrees: Master of Science in Computing and Information Systems

Laravel - created a web event booking system for theme park
Project management skills and understanding of how business operates using PESTLE and SWOT analysis
UXD - evaluated different music streaming services and designed a prototype (Axure) - critical, reasoning and analytical skills obtained through research and literature papers.

degrees: First Class - final year project - a web-based personal organiser system

DBMS skills in Oracle, PostgreSQL, SQLite & MySQL
Learned Python GUI development and functional programming concepts
